articles.title: 3-way talks with the US and Iran begin in Pakistan after earlier indirect discussions
articles.description:
President Donald Trump posted repeatedly on social media leading up to Saturday, saying Iranian officials “have no cards” to negotiate with.

summary: Update: 3-way talks with the US and Iran begin in Pakistan
